seoDescription: Latest news and updates from Faratronic including new product releases, technical announcements, and industry insights.

faqs.question: Where can I find the latest Faratronic product updates?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics provides the latest Faratronic product news and updates on this page. As an authorized distributor, we receive direct updates from Faratronic about new products and technical improvements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to our newsletter or check this page regularly for the latest Faratronic news.

articles.title: Faratronic Expands AEC-Q200 Capacitor Portfolio for EV Applications
articles.summary: Faratronic announces expansion of automotive-grade capacitor portfolio with new AEC-Q200 qualified products for electric vehicle applications.
articles.content:
Faratronic has expanded its automotive capacitor portfolio with new AEC-Q200 qualified products specifically designed for electric vehicle applications. The new capacitors include extended voltage ratings up to 1200V DC for 800V EV systems, enhanced ripple current capability, and Grade 1 temperature qualification (-40°C to +125°C).

Key highlights of the new product line:
- C3A series DC-Link capacitors with 900V and 1200V ratings
- Enhanced ripple current capability up to 25A for high-power onboard chargers
- Full PPAP documentation and automotive traceability
- Extended lifetime for EV application requirements

BeiLuo Electronics, as an authorized Faratronic distributor, now stocks these new automotive capacitors and provides full technical support for EV application development.

articles.title: Faratronic Introduces 2000V High-Voltage Power Capacitors
articles.summary: New C3P series power capacitors with 2000V DC rating for 1500V solar inverters and high-voltage industrial drives.
articles.content:
Faratronic has introduced a new series of high-voltage power capacitors rated for 2000V DC operation. The C3P series is designed for emerging 1500V solar inverter applications and high-voltage industrial motor drives.

The new capacitors feature:
- 2000V DC continuous voltage rating
- High ripple current capability up to 40A
- Low ESR design for efficient operation
- 100,000 hour lifetime at rated conditions
- Compact cylindrical aluminum case

These capacitors enable system designers to implement higher voltage DC buses, reducing current and associated losses in high-power applications. BeiLuo Electronics provides technical support and application guidance for integrating these high-voltage capacitors.

articles.title: Faratronic EMI Capacitors Receive Updated Safety Certifications
articles.summary: MKP X2 and Y2 capacitors now carry updated UL, VDE, and ENEC certifications for global market access.
articles.content:
Faratronic has received updated safety certifications for its MKP series EMI suppression capacitors. The X2 and Y2 capacitors now carry current UL, VDE, and ENEC certifications, ensuring compliance with the latest international safety standards.

Updated certifications include:
- UL 60384-14 4th Edition
- VDE 0560-1:2021
- EN 60384-14:2013+A1:2016
- CQC certification for China market

These certifications ensure that Faratronic EMI capacitors meet the requirements for use in power supplies and appliances worldwide. BeiLuo Electronics can provide certificates of compliance and technical documentation for these certified products.
